title: triticum vulgare var. atratum
intro: Triticum vulgare var. atratum, also known as black spelt or black wheat, is a subspecies of the common wheat plant (Triticum vulgare) with a distinctive dark coloration. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of black spelt include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Black spelt can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
